title: Proud Lion Mandala Coloring Page
seoTitle: Medium Proud Lion Mandala Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this medium proud lion mandala coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Lions are the only social wild cats, living in family groups called prides that can consist of up to 40 lions.
A lion's roar can be heard from up to 5 miles (8 kilometers) away, acting as a warning to intruders.
Coloring safari animals teaches kids about ecological conservation and African savannah wildlife.
